Skip to main content
Beware of Fraud Department impostors
Scammers are spoofing Coast Capital’s phone number and impersonating our employees to obtain your debit card number and banking information.
Coast Capital will NEVER ask for your PIN, password, or security code. If you’ve shared your banking info or debit card details, call us immediately at 1.888.517.7000.

Don't have a mortgage with us?

Let’s find the right mortgage, together. Book an appointment to talk with our Mobile Mortgage Specialists or call us at 1.888.517.7749 to get started.

Find a Mortgage Advisor
Terms and conditions

* See full Mortgage Cash Bonus Promotion terms and conditions.

1. For new high-ratio-insured, closed, residential (owner-occupied) first mortgage loans only. Additional mortgage insurance criteria may apply. This is a variable rate product which will fluctuate with Coast Capital's prime rate. Interest rate and approval based on risk profile. Rates subject to change at any time without notice. Additional fees may apply.

2. APR calculation is based on a $300,000 mortgage at a 25 year amortization, assuming an appraisal fee of $300 (which includes fees associated with determining the value of the property). If there are no additional cost of borrowing changes, the APR and the interest rate will be the same. If additional fees apply, the APR could increase. The APR assumes that the interest rate does not vary over time.

3. For new high-ratio-insured, closed, residential (owner-occupied) first mortgage loans only. Additional mortgage insurance criteria may apply. Interest rate and approval based on risk profile. Rates subject to change at any time without notice. Additional fees may apply.

4. Interest rate and approval based on risk profile. This is a variable rate product which will fluctuate with Coast Capital's prime rate. Rates subject to change at any time without notice. Additional fees may apply.

5. Interest rate and approval based on risk profile. Rates subject to change at any time without notice. Additional fees may apply.

Coast Capital uses cookies and pixels on this site to learn and improve your experience. You can disable cookies in your browser settings, but certain areas of the site may not work as expected if you do. You can disable pixels in some but not all browsers by enabling “tracking” protection. You can find more information on how we use cookies and pixels.
